calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petitioner Allen Robinsons Uncontested Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Dec-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ALLEN ROBINSON's Uncontested Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner Allen Robinson's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
